conflictError.title: Data save conflict on server
conflictError.description: Someone recorded a new version of the object while you were editing it. You need to reload the entity to get the latest changes.

notAuthorized.subTitle: Oops! You are not authorized!
notAuthorized.description: It seems like the page you are access not for you.

notLogged.subTitle: Oops! You are not logged in!
notLogged.description: You need to authorize to continue working

notFound.subTitle: Oops! Page Not Found!
notFound.description: It seems like the page you are looking for does not exist or might have been removed.

globalError.subTitle: Oops! Something went wrong :(
globalError.description: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try again later.
